# Olive Glass & Marble

> Olive Glass & Marble is a Fayetteville, North Carolina company that fabricates and installs custom stone countertops, shower glass, mirrors, backsplashes, and commercial surface projects.

Use this file as a concise guide to the main public pages on the site. Prefer the service pages for current offerings, materials, process details, and contact information.

Primary service area: Fayetteville, NC and surrounding communities in the region.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/): Main company overview, featured services, and primary calls to action.
- [Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/countertops.html): Custom countertop fabrication and installation overview.
- [Glass](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/glass.html): Shower glass, mirrors, and custom glass services.
- [Commercial](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/commercial.html): Commercial fabrication and installation capabilities.
- [Contact](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/contact.html): Contact details and lead form.

## Materials

- [Granite Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/granite-countertops.html): Granite countertop options, fabrication, and installation.
- [Quartz Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/quartz-countertops.html): Quartz countertop options, fabrication, and installation.
- [Quartzite Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/quartzite-countertops.html): Quartzite countertop options, fabrication, and installation.
- [Marble Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/marble-countertops.html): Marble countertop options, fabrication, and installation.
- [Cultured Marble Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/cultured-marble-countertops.html): Cultured marble options and project fit.
- [Sintered Stone Countertops](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/sintered-stone-countertops.html): Sintered stone surface options and project fit.

## Process

- [Our Countertop Process](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/our-process-countertops.html): Countertop consultation, templating, fabrication, and installation steps.
- [Our Glass Process](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/our-process-glass.html): Glass consultation, measurement, fabrication, and installation steps.

## Supporting Pages

- [Products](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/products.html): Material and product overview.
- [Edge Profiles](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/edge-profiles.html): Countertop edge profile options.
- [Backsplash](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/backsplash.html): Backsplash options and related design information.
- [Gallery](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/gallery.html): Completed project examples and visual portfolio.
- [Resources](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/resources.html): Planning resources and supporting information.
- [About](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/about.html): Company background and local business context.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://oliveglassandmarble.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for the public site.
